case_title: FLYNN KAREN VS VARGA BRUCE L.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VARGA BRUCE L.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT VARGA BRUCE L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT FLYNN KAREN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT VARGA BRUCE L.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $139.50 FILED BY VARGA BRUCE L. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FLYNN KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-1995 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $167.98 FILED BY FLYNN KAREN AS TO DEFENDANT VARGA BRUCE L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-1995 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLYNN KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARGA BRUCE L. $167.98 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $182.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
